specialtiesKey: Boat Surveying & Inspection,Diving & Underwater Services,Marine AC & Climate Control,Marine Plumbing & Sanitation

content.tagline: Keeping Your Vessel Running, Season After Season
content.about:
Ben's Boatworks is a full-service marine facility based in Annapolis, MD, dedicated to keeping your vessel in peak operating condition no matter the season. We offer a comprehensive range of specialized marine services and have built a solid reputation among boat owners who depend on reliable, honest work done right the first time.

Our team handles everything from detailed boat surveying and inspection — giving buyers, sellers, and insurers a clear picture of a vessel's true condition — to professional diving and underwater services for hull inspections, prop work, and below-the-waterline repairs. We also specialize in marine AC and climate control systems, keeping your cabin comfortable through the heat of a South Florida summer, and marine plumbing and sanitation, so your onboard systems stay clean, compliant, and functional. Whether it's a pre-purchase survey or a full sanitation overhaul, we bring the same level of care to every job.

Ben's Boatworks serves boat owners across South Florida and the surrounding waters, with a service area that extends up to 60 miles. We understand that your boat represents a significant investment, and we treat it that way. From the marinas and anchorages of Annapolis, MD to the coastal communities we travel to serve, our goal is straightforward: show up, do the work properly, and make sure you can get back on the water with confidence.
content.seoTitle: Ben's Boatworks | Boat Surveying & Inspection Annapolis, MD
content.seoDescription: Ben's Boatworks in Annapolis, MD offers boat surveying, diving services, marine AC & plumbing across South Florida. Call today — 60-mile service area.

serviceDescriptions.Boat Surveying & Inspection: A thorough boat survey covers structural integrity, mechanical systems, safety equipment, and overall vessel condition — giving buyers, sellers, and insurers an accurate, documented assessment before any transaction or coverage decision is made. Our inspections follow industry-standard practices and flag issues that might otherwise go unnoticed until they become costly problems.
serviceDescriptions.Diving & Underwater Services: Our diving and underwater services cover hull inspections, propeller removal and replacement, zinc anode changes, line and debris removal, and below-the-waterline assessments — all without the time and expense of hauling out. Keeping the underwater portion of your vessel clean and in good shape directly affects performance, fuel efficiency, and long-term hull health.
serviceDescriptions.Marine AC & Climate Control: We install, service, and repair marine air conditioning and climate control systems, including chilled water systems, self-contained units, and reverse-cycle setups designed specifically for the marine environment. Proper maintenance of onboard HVAC systems prevents mold, extends equipment life, and keeps the cabin comfortable during extended time aboard.
serviceDescriptions.Marine Plumbing & Sanitation: Our marine plumbing and sanitation work includes installation and repair of holding tanks, through-hulls, seacocks, bilge pumps, freshwater systems, and MSD-compliant waste systems. A properly functioning sanitation system is essential for both onboard comfort and compliance with marine environmental regulations.

content.serviceAreaDescription: Ben's Boatworks is based in Annapolis, MD and provides mobile marine services throughout South Florida within a 60-mile radius.
commonProjects: Pre-purchase boat survey and full condition report for buyers
Hull and running gear inspection via professional underwater diving
Marine AC unit installation or seasonal service and repair
Holding tank replacement and sanitation system overhaul
Propeller removal, zinc anode replacement, and hull cleaning dive
Freshwater plumbing repair and through-hull fitting inspection
Insurance or damage survey following a vessel incident or grounding
